name: Breton Apple Tart
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------BRETON DOUGH--------------------------------
1 cup Butter
1 cup Sugar
1 tsp Vanilla Extract
1 tbsp Dark Rum, optional
4 Egg Yolks
Variation: Breton Walnut Tart
-------------------------------WALNUT FILLING-------------------------------
2 3/4 cups All-Purpose Flour
1/2 cup Light Brown Sugar
1/4 cup Butter
1/3 cup Honey
2 cups Walnut Pieces (coarsely chopped)
Try substituting firm-ripe peaches for the apples in this filling for a seasonal variation.
For the Apple Filling:
1. Peel, core, and slice the apples into a large saucepan.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and cook the apples covered until they exude their juices.
3. Uncover the apples, lower the heat, and allow juices to evaporate.
4. Cool the filling.
For the Breton Dough:
1. Beat the butter until soft using a hand mixer set at medium speed or a heavy-duty mixer fitted with the paddle.
2. Beat in the sugar in a stream. Continue beating until the mixture lightens.
3. Beat in the rum and vanilla, then the yolks one at a time, beating until the mixture is very smooth and light.
4. Using a rubber spatula, fold in the flour by hand until the dough is smooth.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F and set a rack in the lowest level.
6. Butter a 10-by-2-inch deep tart pan.
7. Cut a disk of parchment or wax paper and place it in the bottom of the pan; butter the paper.
8. Place half the dough in the pan and use a spatula to spread it evenly over the bottom of the pan.
9. Spread the cooled filling on the dough.
10. Flour the remaining dough and press it into a 10-inch disk on a cardboard or tart-pan bottom.
11. Slide the dough over the filling and press it into place, making sure that the sides are straight and even.
12. Brush the top of the Breton with a beaten egg yolk.
13. Bake for 40-45 minutes, until well colored. Cool on a rack.
Variation: Breton Walnut Tart
For the Walnut Filling:
1. Bring sugar, butter, and honey to a boil, stirring occasionally.
2. Boil 2 minutes. Stir in walnuts and cool.
3. Proceed as for Breton Apple Tart above.
